title: CQL Test Configuration
description: Configuration for CQL test execution: test case exclusions and runtime parameter overrides.

testCasesToExclude.description: Test cases to skip during execution.

testCase.description: Patient UUID of the test case to exclude.

reason.description: Why this test case is excluded.

parameters.description: Runtime parameter overrides. Each entry is either a global parameter (no 'library' field) or a library-scoped block (has 'library' field). Merge order: global → library → testCase (highest priority wins).

name.description: The CQL parameter name as declared in the library (e.g. "Measurement Period").

type.description: The CQL type of the parameter.

value.description: The parameter value as a string. For String/Integer/Decimal/Boolean: raw value (e.g. "HMO", "42", "true"). For DateTime/Date/Time: CQL literal (e.g. "@2024-01-15"). For Interval<DateTime>: CQL literal (e.g. "Interval[@2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z, @2025-01-01T00:00:00.000Z)").

library.description: The CQL library name these parameters apply to.

version.description: Optional. When specified, parameters only apply to this exact library version. Omit to match any version.

parameters.description: Library-scoped parameter overrides — applied to all test cases for this library.

testCases.description: Test-case-scoped parameter overrides. Keys are patient UUIDs (directory names under input/tests/{MeasureName}/). Highest priority — overrides both global and library entries.
